---
# ── DEBUGGING POST ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy this whole file into src/content/blog/your-post-slug.mdx and fill it in.
# The file NAME becomes the URL: src/content/blog/soql-101.mdx → /blog/soql-101
# Lines starting with # are comments — they are ignored, you can delete them.

type: debugging # ← do NOT change (this picks the debugging template)
title: '' # ← the post title (also the H1 + SEO title)
description: '' # ← 1–2 line summary (shown on cards + Google). Keep < 160 chars.

# Structured fields — these render as the colored callout boxes automatically.
symptom: '' # ← the exact error / what the user sees   (REQUIRED)
environment: '' # ← where it happens (optional) e.g. "Apex trigger, bulk DML"
status: solved # ← solved | workaround | investigating
rootCause: '' # ← why it happens (optional)
resolution: '' # ← the fix (optional — shown as the green box at the end)

# Metadata
publishedAt: 2026-01-01 # ← publish date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use today's date.
# updatedAt: 2026-01-15      # ← OPTIONAL: uncomment when you revise the post
difficulty: Intermediate # ← Beginner | Intermediate | Advanced (optional, or delete)
tags: [Apex, Triggers] # ← topic tags (optional)
featured: false # ← true = pin to the homepage
published: true # ← false = keep private (no page, not listed). Flip to publish.
---
